item.title: Cognition Signs MOU with U.S. Department of Energy to Join The Genesis Mission
item.description: Cognition has signed a memorandum of understanding with the U.S. Department of Energy to join the Genesis Mission, a national initiative described as "America

item.title: Welcoming TierZero to Cognition
item.description: Anhang and Yun have gone deep on everything that keeps software running once it ships, and we are excited to bring their work on automations into Devin.

item.title: One Year of Building Together
item.description: One year ago, Cognition and Windsurf came together over the craziest 72 hours of our lives. Here’s what we’ve built together since.
